C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc libTinySTL.a CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Detail/Alloc.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Detail/String.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Detail/TrieTree.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Profiler/Profiler.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/AVLTreeTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/AlgorithmTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/BinarySearchTreeTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/BitmapTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/COWPtrTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/CircularBufferTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/DequeTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/GraphTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/ListTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/PairTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/PriorityQueueTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/QueueTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/RefTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/SharedPtrTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/StackTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/StringTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/SuffixArrayTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/TrieTreeTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/TypeTraitsTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/UFSetTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/UniquePtrTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/Unordered_setTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/Test/VectorTest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/TinySTL.dir/TinySTL/main.cpp.obj
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ranlib.exe libTinySTL.a
